analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.response_rate_desc: Percentage of applications that received a response (interview, offer, or rejection).
analytics.avg_response_desc: Average days between application date and last contact (used as proxy for first response).

resume_review.privacy_title: 100% Private — All analysis runs locally in your browser
resume_review.privacy_description: No data is sent to any server or API. Your resume and job description never leave your device.
resume_review.no_keywords: No keywords found for this filter.
resume_review.missing_description: Consider adding these terms to your resume if they match your experience.
resume_review.tip_too_short: Resume is very short ({count} words). Aim for 400–800 words.
resume_review.tip_short: Resume is short ({count} words). Consider adding more detail. Aim for 400–800 words.
resume_review.tip_long: Resume is long ({count} words). Consider trimming to 600–800 words for best readability.
resume_review.tip_good_verbs: Great use of action verbs ({count} found).
resume_review.tip_few_verbs: Only {count} action verbs found. Use more verbs like: achieved, implemented, designed, led, optimized.
resume_review.tip_no_verbs: Very few action verbs found. Start bullet points with strong verbs like: achieved, built, designed, implemented, led.
resume_review.tip_good_metrics: Good use of quantified achievements ({count} numbers/metrics found).
resume_review.tip_few_metrics: Add more quantified achievements (e.g., "Increased performance by 40%", "Managed team of 8").
resume_review.tip_few_sections: Consider adding clear section headers (Experience, Education, Skills, Projects).
resume_review.tip_no_sections: No clear section headers detected. Add headers like: Experience, Education, Skills, Projects.
resume_review.tip_good_bullets: Good use of bullet points for readability.
resume_review.tip_few_bullets: Consider using bullet points to improve readability.

cv_viewer.no_selection: Select an application to view or generate a tailored CV.
cv_viewer.no_cv: No tailored CV generated yet for this application.
cv_viewer.no_cv_hint: Use Claude via MCP to generate a tailored CV, or click Generate CV.
cv_viewer.no_jd: No job description available — keyword analysis requires a job description.

onboarding.done_description: Your CRM is ready to use. Here are some tips to get you started:

legal.title: Legal Notice

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This is a personal, non-commercial project. The following explains what data is collected and how it is used.
privacy.what_collected_text: When you sign in with Google, we receive your name, email address, and profile picture from Google. Additionally, any data you enter into the application (opportunities, contacts, notes, uploaded files) is stored in the database.
privacy.how_used_text: Your data is used solely to provide the functionality of this application. It is not shared with third parties, sold, or used for advertising.
privacy.cookies_text: This application uses essential cookies only: an authentication session cookie and a language preference cookie. No tracking or analytics cookies are used.
privacy.data_storage_text: Data is stored on the server running this application. There is no guarantee of data availability or durability. You are responsible for making regular backups of your data.
privacy.deletion_text: To request deletion of your data, contact the operator listed in the Legal Notice section below.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using this application, you agree to the following terms.
terms.as_is_text: This application is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, express or implied. The operator makes no guarantees regarding availability, reliability, or fitness for any particular purpose.
terms.no_liability_text: The operator is not liable for any data loss, downtime, or damages arising from the use of this application. Use it at your own risk.
terms.backups_text: You are solely responsible for maintaining backups of your data. The operator does not guarantee that data will be preserved.
terms.changes_text: These terms may be updated at any time. Continued use of the application constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

impressum.title: Legal Notice (Impressum)
impressum.name: Christian Pojoni
impressum.disclaimer: This is a personal, non-commercial project.

legal.login_agree: By signing in, you agree to the <terms>Terms of Use</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
